name: Risotto with Spring Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces baby carrots, peeled and sliced
4 ounces snow peas, trimmed and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the broth to a boil. Add carrots and cook until almost tender (3-5 minutes).
2. Add asparagus and peas and cook for an additional minute.
3. Using a slotted spoon, remove the vegetables to a bowl and set aside.
4. Maintain the broth at a gentle simmer.
5. In a Dutch oven, heat oil over medium-low heat. Add onion and garlic and cook until softened (3-5 minutes).
6. Add rice and stir to coat the grains. Pour in wine and cook, stirring frequently, until most of the liquid has been absorbed.
7. Gradually add broth, 1 cup at a time, stirring until each cup is absorbed before adding the next.
8. Stir in artichoke hearts and thyme. Continue to add broth as needed.
9. Stir in the reserved vegetables and cheese.
10. Serve immediately.
